hero.title: Guided by the Light of a Star
hero.subtitle: Empowered by faith and service, we illuminate the path to lifelong learning and compassionate leadership.

hero.title: Excellence Rooted in Values
hero.subtitle: At CITCI, we nurture morally upright, intellectually equipped, and service-driven individuals ready to make a difference.

hero.title: Building Futures with Purpose
hero.subtitle: Through holistic education and inspired teaching, we prepare students to lead with integrity in a changing world.

discover.title: Facilities
discover.description: Classrooms, science labs, library, and athletic facilities designed to enhance learning.

discover.title: Dedicated Faculty
discover.description: Experienced teachers committed to academic excellence and Catholic values.

discover.title: Academic Excellence
discover.description: Rigorous curriculum preparing students for success in college and beyond.

discover.title: Community Engagement
discover.description: Instilling a spirit of service and social responsibility in every student.

discover.title: Faith Formation
discover.description: Daily prayer, regular Mass, and religious education nurturing spiritual growth.

activities.title: 50th Alumni Homecoming
activities.description: It was a blast! Here are some highlights from the Alumni Night showcasing different batches with their Boho-themed outfits! Congratulations to all who made it possible, especially to the host batch of 1999!

activities.title: 121st Founding Anniversary
activities.description: Candelarians played sports and parlor games with the spirit of camaraderie, enjoying the game while building friendship with each other.

activities.title: Festival of Talents
activities.description: Elementary departments from Candelaria Institute of Technology of Cabadbaran, Inc. and Fr. Urios Academic of Magallanes, Inc. showcased their God-given gifts in this year's Festival of Talents

activities.title: Division Athletic Meet
activities.description: Congratulations to our Candelarians who bagged a lot of medals last Division Athletic Meet held at Caraga State University Cabadbaran Campus

activities.title: BSP & GSP Encampment
activities.description: Joint BSP and GSP Encampment Elementary department at Calo Farm, Brgy. Sanghan, Cabadbaran City. A memorable moment for our Frolicsome Candelarians

activities.title: Rosary Month
activities.description: The culmination of the Month of Rosary. Candelarians prayed the Rosary and offered roses to the Blessed Virgin Mary. Afterwards, each section competed in the Parade of Mary
